# Aria Care

Aria Care is an AI support documentation platform for individual support workers and disability support providers in Australia and New Zealand.

Primary website: https://www.ariacare.app

## What Aria Care Does

- Turns voice notes and bullet points into structured, review-ready support note drafts.
- Helps workers create progress notes, handovers, incident drafts, risk concern notes, and support summaries.
- Lets Solo users review, edit, save, and copy drafts into workplace platforms such as ShiftCare, Lumary, Brevity, CareMaster, or provider systems.
- Gives provider teams shared dashboards, review workflows, billing/rostering pathways, and admin controls.
- Includes an About page explaining that Aria Care is built by Leo in New Zealand for support workers and providers across Australia and New Zealand.
- Adds documentation quality scoring and care-signal highlighting to help reduce missing details.
- GoalLink Copilot turns participant goals into simple goal cards and connects notes to goals only when the worker's input supports it.
- Adaptive Shift Debrief Mode asks 2-4 useful follow-up questions instead of forcing long forms.
- Plan Review Evidence Packs summarise 30/60/90-day note history into review themes such as goals, support examples, risks, presentation changes, and follow-up actions.
- Universal Platform Bridge can import rough-note photos and creates paste-ready formats for ShiftCare, Lumary, Brevity, CareMaster, email handover, incident summaries, and plain text.
- Dignity + Risk Guardian helps catch vague, judgemental, risky, or overconfident wording before a note is submitted.

## Important Safety Language

Aria Care creates drafts only. Users should always review and edit documentation before submitting it to a workplace system. For incident or risk notes, users should follow their organisation's incident reporting and escalation process.

Do not describe Aria Care as legally compliant, clinically approved, NDIS approved, or guaranteed compliant.

## Useful Pages

- Homepage: https://www.ariacare.app
- About: https://www.ariacare.app/about

- Blog: https://www.ariacare.app/blog
- Support-worker AI notes guide: https://www.ariacare.app/blog/ai-progress-notes-support-workers
- Support: https://www.ariacare.app/support
- Privacy: https://www.ariacare.app/privacy
- Terms: https://www.ariacare.app/terms

## Audience

- Individual support workers
- NDIS and disability support providers
- SIL teams
- Coordinators and team leaders
- Admin and operations teams

## Best Short Description

Aria Care turns messy after-shift voice notes and bullet points into structured, review-ready support note drafts that workers can copy into ShiftCare, Lumary, Brevity, CareMaster, or their provider's existing system.
